calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Text Ruling

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioners: Manissa Lau Ta and Andy Ta, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Nicholas Hai-Phong Ta, and with Cantonese Interperter: Charles Zhang.
Petitioners and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Jack Tri-Juu Ta.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Reset To Aug-30-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
